item.title: Levi s Homme Long-Sleeve Original Housemark Tee Cotton + Patch Dress Blues XL
item.description: Vous avez Levi s Homme Long-Sleeve Original Housemark Tee Cotton + Patch Dress Blues XL ici: ℹ️: Toucher jersey doux Ceci est un authentique produit Levi’s Petit logo de la marque Levis brodé 🛒 Achetez-le maintenant!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
